allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\(''./src/app/documentation/data/rigTutorials/deformer.js''\).then\(m=>{console.log\(''OK'', m.deformer.id, ''| sections:'', m.deformer.article.sections.length\); let imgs=0; m.deformer.article.sections.forEach\(s=>s.body.forEach\(b=>{if\(b&&b.image\)imgs++}\)\); console.log\(''images:'', imgs, ''| video:'', !!m.deformer.article.video\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(''FAIL'', e.message\); process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''file:///tmp/xy-check.mjs''\).then\(m=>{const a=m.xy.article; const imgs=[]; const walk=arr=>arr&&arr.forEach\(b=>{if\(b&&b.image\)imgs.push\(b.image.src\)}\); a.sections.forEach\(s=>{walk\(s.body\); \(s.subsections||[]\).forEach\(ss=>walk\(ss.body\)\)}\); console.log\(''OK id=''+m.xy.id+'' label=''+m.xy.label+'' sections=''+a.sections.length+'' images=''+imgs.length+'' hasVideo=''+!!a.video\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(''FAIL'',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\(''./src/app/documentation/data/rigTutorials/animator.js''\).then\(m => { const a = m.animator; console.log\(''OK id='', a.id, ''sections='', a.article.sections.length, ''video='', !!a.article.video\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(''FAIL'', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\(''./src/app/documentation/data/rigTutorials/animator.js''\).then\(m => { const a = m.animator; console.log\(''id='' + a.id, ''label='' + a.label, ''sections='' + a.article.sections.length, ''hasVideo='' + \(a.article.video ? ''yes'' : ''no''\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\);const p=''src/app/documentation/data/rigTutorials/xy.js'';let s=fs.readFileSync\(p,''utf8''\).replace\(/export const xy =/, ''const xy =''\)+''\\nmodule.exports={xy};'';fs.writeFileSync\(''/tmp/xy-check.cjs'',s\);const {xy}=require\(''/tmp/xy-check.cjs''\);const a=xy.article;const imgs=[];const walk=arr=>arr&&arr.forEach\(b=>{if\(b&&b.image\)imgs.push\(b.image.src\)}\);a.sections.forEach\(sec=>{walk\(sec.body\);\(sec.subsections||[]\).forEach\(ss=>walk\(ss.body\)\)}\);console.log\(''OK id=''+xy.id+'' sections=''+a.sections.length+'' images=''+imgs.length+'' hasVideo=''+!!a.video\);console.log\(''NonAscii:'', /[^\\x00-\\x7F]/.test\(fs.readFileSync\(p,''utf8''\)\)?''FOUND'':''none''\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\(''file:///tmp/animator-check.mjs''\).then\(m => { const a = m.animator; const imgs = a.article.sections.flatMap\(s => s.body.filter\(b => b.image\)\); console.log\(''id='' + a.id + '' sections='' + a.article.sections.length + '' images='' + imgs.length + '' video='' + \(a.article.video?''yes'':''no''\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\);const os=require\(''os''\);const path=require\(''path''\);const p=''src/app/documentation/data/rigTutorials/xy.js'';const raw=fs.readFileSync\(p,''utf8''\);let s=raw.replace\(/export const xy =/, ''const xy =''\)+''\\nmodule.exports={xy};'';const out=path.join\(os.tmpdir\(\),''xy-check.cjs''\);fs.writeFileSync\(out,s\);const {xy}=require\(out\);const a=xy.article;const imgs=[];const walk=arr=>arr&&arr.forEach\(b=>{if\(b&&b.image\)imgs.push\(b.image.src\)}\);a.sections.forEach\(sec=>{walk\(sec.body\);\(sec.subsections||[]\).forEach\(ss=>walk\(ss.body\)\)}\);console.log\(''OK id=''+xy.id+'' sections=''+a.sections.length+'' images=''+imgs.length+'' hasVideo=''+!!a.video\);console.log\(''NonAscii in file:'', /[^\\x00-\\x7F]/.test\(raw\)?''FOUND'':''none''\);console.log\(imgs.join\(''\\n''\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\(''./src/app/documentation/data/rigTutorials/animator.js''\).then\(m => { const a = m.animator; const imgs = a.article.sections.flatMap\(s => s.body.filter\(b => b && b.image\).map\(b => b.image.src\)\); console.log\(''id='' + a.id\); console.log\(''sections='' + a.article.sections.length\); console.log\(''images='' + imgs.length\); console.log\(''video='' + \(a.article.video ? a.article.video.src : ''none''\)\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(''FAIL '' + e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
